betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Electrolysis Machine§f is a large multiblock for §bhigh-efficiency fluid separation§f and §badvanced ore processing§f. Critical for maximizing resource yields.

§eMode 1 (Fluid Separation):§f
Accepts compatible fluids and splits into two products:
• §b2000mB Water§f → 200mB §bLiquid Oxygen§f + 200mB §bLiquid Hydrogen§f
• §b2000mB Heavy Water§f → 200mB Liquid Oxygen + 200mB §bDeuterium§f
• §b250mB Potassium Chloride Solution§f → 125mB §bChlorine Gas§f + 1 Dust
• §b250mB Calcium Chloride Solution§f → 125mB Chlorine Gas + 125mB Calcium Solution

§eMode 2 (Ore Processing):§f
Requires §bNitric Acid§f - processes ore-derived crystals for maximum yield:
• §aMain Output (Green):§f §e6 ingots§f of molten metal
• §aSecondary (Red):§f §e2 ingots§f of molten metal
• §aByproduct:§f §e3 nuggets§f (typically Lithium)

§eOutlet mechanics§f same as Crucible - direct piping or mold casting.

§ePower:§f Consumes §e200kHE/s§f (requires dedicated energy infrastructure).

§aTips:§f
• Place §bStrand Caster§f directly underneath for rapid ingot casting
• Use as §bfinal step§f in ore processing chain (after Ore Acidizer crystals)
• §aInstall Power Saving upgrade (level 2+)§f to significantly reduce consumption with minimal speed penalty
